title: Ability to mark updates as resolved or complete
excerpt: The ability to resolve or archive updates so that they can be removed from the updates section without fully deleting them. Sometimes team discussions take place in the updates and action items occur as a result. It’d be…

posts.author: ajasz (Angelica Jaszewski)
posts.cookedHtml: The ability to resolve or archive updates so that they can be removed from the updates section without fully deleting them. Sometimes team discussions take place in the updates and action items occur as a result. It’d be great to be able to say “this is complete” so others know the status. Some of these things don’t fall well under items or sub-items, they only work as an update due to the organic nature of the conversations.
